channel.title: Categories on Pure theme for Hugo
channel.description: Recent content in Categories on Pure theme for Hugo

item.title: Python Metaclass and It's Magic Methods
item.description: Python is one of my favourite language. It is very intuitive, simple and a powerful language. It’s power comes from its ability to give the developers the freedom to manipulate the language at run time. One such ability is how a programmer can intercept the control during class object creation and change its outlook entirely from what programmer intented. This is achieved through a language feature called metaclass. metaclass is a class of a class.

item.title: 2020 3/4 In Review
item.description: I always wanted to blog as far as I can remember but for some reason it never came to fruition. Probably because I am very lazy. But this time I have made my mind that I will blog every week no matter how silly the posts are. This gives me an opportunity to introspect about my life and also a nice way to improve my english language skills. I don’t have to mention how good 2020 is for everyone :).

item.title: About
item.description: A passionate computer programmer, avid movie watcher and a cat lover :) Find me on GitHub
